home.heroTitle: Air Pollution Control Device Manufacturers Empanelment
home.heroSubtitle: Get your company empaneled as an approved manufacturer of Air Pollution Control Devices under the Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) guidelines.
home.onlineApplicationDesc: Complete paperless process with online document submission
home.trackProgressDesc: Real-time status updates and notifications at every stage
home.secureTransparentDesc: Government-grade security with complete audit trail
home.apcdCategoriesDesc: Manufacturers can apply for empanelment in the following Air Pollution Control Device categories
home.empanelmentProcessDesc: Follow these steps to get your company empaneled as an approved APCD manufacturer
home.step1Desc: Create your account with basic company details
home.step2Desc: Fill the application form with required documents
home.step3Desc: NPC officers verify your submitted documents
home.step4Desc: Provisional Empanelment is granted after verification and fulfillment of all required documents
home.step5Desc: Field verification of any of the APCD installations mentioned in the applicant's experience credentials
home.step6Desc: Expert committee reviews the field verification report
home.step7Desc: Final Empanelment is awarded upon successful field verification, valid for 2 years
home.eligibilityDesc: Ensure you meet the following criteria before starting your application
home.readyToStartDesc: Register now and begin your APCD OEM empanelment application. Our team is here to guide you through the process.
home.aboutDesc: The APCD OEM Empanelment Portal is an initiative of the National Productivity Council (NPC) for the Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) to streamline the process of empaneling Air Pollution Control Device manufacturers.
home.quickActionDesc: Get started with your empanelment journey
home.startApplicationCardDesc: Start your empanelment application in minutes
home.verifyRequirements: Verify if you meet the requirements
home.fastApprovalDesc: Get approved in 7-10 working days with our streamlined process.
home.realtimeTrackingDesc: Track your application status live with detailed updates.
home.secureTransparentFeatureDesc: Bank-level security with complete transparency in process.
home.govVerifiedDesc: Official portal backed by CPCB and MoEFCC.
home.digitalCertsDesc: Instant digital certificate download upon approval.
home.onlineFeatureDesc: Complete paperless process with online document submission.
home.testimonial1: The application process is simple and transparent. Got approved in just 10 days!
home.testimonial2: Easy document upload and real-time tracking system. Very professional portal.
home.testimonial3: The admin support was excellent. They guided us through the entire process.
home.feeStructureDesc: Transparent pricing with no hidden charges
home.feeExample: Example: For 3 product categories, total fee = ₹25,000 + (3 × ₹65,000) + GST (18%) = ₹2,59,600
home.haveQuestionsContact: Have questions? Contact our support team
home.multiCategoryNote: Note: You can apply for empanelment in multiple categories
home.espDesc: Electrostatic Precipitator Systems for industrial emission control
home.bagFiltersDesc: High-efficiency filtration systems for particulate control
home.scrubbersDesc: Wet and dry scrubbing systems for gas cleaning
home.fumeExtractionDesc: Industrial fume and dust extraction systems
home.footerAboutText: The APCD OEM Empanelment Portal is an initiative by the National Productivity Council for the Central Pollution Control Board to streamline the empanelment of Air Pollution Control Device manufacturers.
home.faq1A: Manufacturers of Air Pollution Control Devices (APCDs) with valid GST registration, manufacturing facilities in India, at least 3 years of operating history, and a minimum of 3 APCD installations can apply.
home.faq2A: Company registration certificates, GST registration, PAN card, manufacturing facility proof, product catalogs, NABL-accredited test reports, ISO certifications (if available), and installation experience proof (minimum 3 installations).
home.faq3Q: How long does the process take?
home.faq3A: The complete empanelment process typically takes 45-60 working days after submission of a complete application with all required documents.
home.faq4Q: What is the validity of the certificate?
home.faq4A: The empanelment certificate is valid for 2 years from the date of issuance and can be renewed before expiry.
home.faq5Q: What are the fees for empanelment?
home.faq5A: The application fee is ₹25,000 plus ₹65,000 per APCD type selected, plus 18% GST. MSE/DPIIT-recognized startups and Class-I local suppliers are eligible for a 15% discount.
home.faq6Q: Can I apply for multiple APCD categories?
home.faq6A: Yes, you can select multiple APCD categories in a single application. Each additional APCD type has a separate fee of ₹65,000.
home.faq7A: Provisional Empanelment is granted after verification and fulfillment of all required documents. Based on the document evaluation, the Evaluation Committee recommends the applicant for Provisional Empanelment. This status remains valid until completion of field evaluation.
home.faq8Q: What is Final Empanelment and Field Verification Process?
home.faq8A: After Provisional Empanelment, field verification is conducted by the Field Verification Team along with laboratory monitoring to assess operational and technical compliance. Based on the findings and submission of the field verification report, the Committee may recommend the applicant for Final Empanelment. Final Empanelment is valid for a period of two (2) years. The field verification fee is ₹57,000/- plus applicable GST.
